action: C2 phase handoff JSON schemas + framework: 8 NEW schema files at .evolve/schemas/handoff-<phase>.json (intent, scout, triage, tdd, build, audit, ship, retrospective) using JSON Schema v2020-12 modeled on scripts/cli_adapters/_capabilities-schema.json. NEW .agents/skills/evolve-loop/reference/output-contracts.md (phase × schema × validation-command table). NEW docs/adr/0009-phase-handoff-schemas.md. NEW scripts/utility/handoff-lint.sh (jq -e wrapper against schemas). ~700 LoC mostly JSON.
operator_note: Pure docs/schemas, zero behavior change. Common envelope per schema: schema_version, cycle_id, phase, agent, challenge_token, timestamp, prev_handoff_sha, verdict, confidence, cost_usd, tree_sha, unstructured_observations[]. Phase-specific bodies — audit: acceptance_criteria_results[{ac_id,status,evidence}] + anti_goal_violations[] + scope_match + adversarial_checks[] + AUDIT_BOUND_TREE_SHA; ship: commit_sha + TREE_SHA_COMMITTED + pushed + ledger_entry_id; build: modified_files[{path,loc_delta}] + untracked_files[] + worktree_tree_sha + test_results[]; scout: evidence_files[] + predicted_target_files[] + risk_assessment + build_plan_summary; intent: selected_task_id + scope_files[] + anti_goals[] + acceptance_criteria[] + adaptive_decision; triage: top_n[] + deferred[] + dropped[] + cycle_size_estimate + inbox_files_claimed[]; tdd: red_tests[] + expected_failure_count; retrospective: formalize existing fields. Validation: handoff-lint.sh accepts well-formed + rejects malformed. Backward-validate: 5 historical handoff-retrospective.json files MUST all validate against new schema (proves schemas model reality, not fantasy).
